title: Myopia rates in children are rising. Why Is Eye Health Still a Blind Spot? [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Childhood myopia is rising fast across Europe, yet remains overlooked. Without action, half of Western school‑leavers may be myopic by 2035. Proven solutions exist: more outdoor time and regular vision checks. EU policy must embed children’s eye health.
